plugins.description: Persistent cross-session notification inbox for automated agents and cron jobs.

plugins.description: Apple Music control and intelligent playlist curation.

plugins.name: claude-tone
plugins.description: Unique pentatonic notification tone per session. Plays on Stop and Notification events.

plugins.name: tomatobar

plugins.name: marked-preview
plugins.description: Generate markdown and preview in Marked 2. Rich formatted output outside the terminal.
